meaning: 湖畔派诗人,习惯于在湖上居住(或工作,航行)的人;n.湖鱼(尤指鲑鱼),湖船(尤指北美洲五大湖上的船)
examples: No other Laker played like a champion today.
I want to be a Laker for the rest of my life.
I got on and he said, 'Mitch, I want to be a Laker.
No Laker but Bryant made a shot in the first seven minutes of the fourth.
Former Laker Gary Payton, who made the basketball Hall of Fame this week, attended the game.
